positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene featuring glowing bioluminescent flora, deep roots, and floating whimsical geometric shapes. A stylized deer silhouette, bathed in ethereal moonlight, stands amidst the glowing plants. Use a high-contrast, neo-Art Nouveau aesthetic with bold lines, saturated jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst), and complementary pops of electric cyan. The composition must be perfectly centered, maximizing negative space around the central figures for apparel printing. Clean linework, flat vector elements mixed with photorealistic glowing details. --ar 1:1 --style whimsical, nature, mystical
